purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_eyelids mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal upper and lower eyelid texture preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, gaze direction, eye shape, eyelid fold placement, eyelashes, iris color, pupil size, sclera tone, catchlights, eyebrow position, nearby hair occlusion, surrounding skin texture, nose bridge, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, gaze change, mismatched eyes, crossed eyes, asymmetrical eyes, enlarged eyes, heavy eyelids, drooping eyelids, swollen eyelids, eyeliner, makeup change, eyelash mutation, eyebrow change, iris color change, glassy eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, sclera discoloration, catchlight change, hair mutation, hair occlusion change, nose bridge change, face shape drift, skin tone change, visible seam, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: upper and lower eyelid detail remains natural
gaze, pupil, iris, sclera, and catchlights remain stable
eyelashes and eyebrows do not mutate
no visible seam around eyelid masks

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the revised Wave70 eyelid mask with extremely low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing gaze, eyelash, brow, and identity drift.
